# terrible_ravendb_ravendb_healthcheck (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `url` (String) Base URL of the RavenDB node to check, e.g. `http://node-a:8080` or `https://node-a:443`.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `ca_cert_path` (String) Path to a CA bundle used to validate the server certificate.
- `certificate_path` (String) Path to a client certificate for secured clusters.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `checks` (String) List of health checks to run.
- `db_retry_interval_seconds` (Number) Interval in seconds between attempts for `db_groups_available` and `db_groups_available_excluding_target`.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `max_time_to_wait` (Number) Max time window in seconds for each selected check before timing out.
- `on_db_timeout` (String) Behavior when `db_groups_available` times out. `fail` fails the task; `continue` returns success with timeout noted in results.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `retry_interval_seconds` (Number) Interval in seconds between attempts for `node_alive` and `cluster_connectivity`.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `validate_certificate` (Boolean) Verify the server TLS certificate when using HTTPS. Automatically disabled for IP hosts when running `node_alive` or `cluster_connectivity`.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `msg` (String) Summary string of executed checks and outcomes.
- `results` (String) Per-check structured results including attempts, error (if any), and detail.
- `warnings` (String) Optional warnings (e.g., cert validation auto-disabled for IP hosts).
